feed.title: SAP Community - SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud
feed.subtitle: SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: How to send email in SAP S/4 HANA Cloud public on creation of Purchase order to approve
entry.content:
Hi

I am looking for a solution to implement Auto email send to approver once Purchase Order created/Modified in SAP S/4 Hana Cloud system.

Please share if anything help me in this

 

#sap S4HANA  #Email Send

entry.title: Add "Start Date" & "End Date" fields in Customer Statement Form
entry.content:
Hello all, 

In "Customer Statement" form, we need to add "Start Date" and "End Date" as fields in the table that contain Open Items on the item level, and since the fields are not available in Standard form, we have to add custom fields. Can you please tell us which Business Context we have to use to add these custom fields in Customer Statement form ? Could you please tell us which is the appropriate BADI to use to determine the "Start Date" & "End Date" information ?

Many Thanks,

entry.title: Sales Organizational Structure - Ad Service Industry
entry.content:
Hi All,

I have a question about the Sales Organizational Structure for Service industry.

Customer is an Ad service company who reach customers via Instagram, Facebook. Also, they say have 500+ dispensaries. They couldn't understand the SAP terms how more specific we explain.

Could somebody give examples how this Sales Organizational Structure works for a Ad service company?

How to explain them to make this understand.

SAP S/4HANA SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud SAP S/4HANA Cloud for Sales SD (Sales and Distribution) 

Thanks!

entry.title: How to generate quality certificates for outbound deliveries?
entry.content:
Dear Experts,

We have a requirement to generate the quality certificate against the Outbound deliveries and send the printout to customers. We have configured the quality certificate option, but we are getting only the Manage Quality certificates for Batches and Inspection Lots, we are not finding the fiori app for Manage Quality Certificates for Deliveries.

Could you please let us know if we are missing something, which app we should use to generate quality certificate based on outbound deliveries. 

Thanks


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Moving a part of existing "On-Premise ECC" to "SAP S/4 HANA Cloud"
entry.content:
Hi,

We have a Production ECC System which is on EHP7 Non-Unicode.

It has 2 Production Work Clients - Clients A and B.

Client-A of it is being used for HR and GCS. 

Client-B is being used for Plant Maintenance, Finance and Quality Mgmt.

We are looking on the Option to move a part of one of the "Client-A only i.e. GCS to SAP S/4 HANA Cloud" whereas others will still be on On-Premise itself.

Please help with the possible Options/approaches in moving with this scenario from On-Premise ECC to SAP S/4 HANA Cloud without disturbing the others.

Thanks.

Regards,

Gowtham

entry.title: Customer Invoice Country Translation
entry.content:
Hi Team,

In S/4HANA Public Cloud, where do you update the translation of a Country when printing invoices? We are a German customer and when printing the invoice for a Country in English, the German translation of the Country Name appears on the invoice instead of the English Country Name translation. 

Kind regards,

Andrew

entry.title: What is the difference between OMS and OMM, while using SAP Commerce with S/4 Hana which to use?
entry.content:
We are planning to integrate SAP Commerce Cloud with S/4 Hana Public Cloud, as part of this we need to integrate the Order notifications. 

When I went through the documentation we need to use hooks for notifications but I see oms and omm hooks for e.g : sapCpiOmmOrderConfirmationPersistenceHook and sapCpiOmsOrderConfirmationPersistenceHook, I am bit confused on which one to use in iflow.

Thank you

entry.title: S/4 HANA Public Cloud Access
entry.content:
Hi all 

What are the Access methods for S/4 HANA ? Will there will be any GUI to access it ?

entry.title: BUSINESS TRANSACTION IN SAP S/4HANA CLOUD, PUBLIC EDITION
entry.content:
Hi SAP Experts! ,
Would like to know if there is a way to display or edit business transactions  per document types in SAP CBC or in S/4Hana cloud? I keep on having an error  'Item Category 02000 not allowed in accounting transaction 0300/0001.' when using the complex posting in Create Incoming Invoice app.

Why complex posting? For example, I want to record payable to supplier and charge to customer(employee) the excess from the supplier's bill. 

The entry would be: 

01 Customer ---------xx

31 Supplier -----------xx

Instead of Creating transaction in Create incoming invoice,

40 G/l clearing acct---------xx 

31 Supplier ------------------xx 

AND 

Create Outgoing invoice 

01 Customer ---------------xx

50 G/L Clearing acct------xx

By the way, I am using SAP s/4hana Cloud, Public Edition TDD system. 

 

Thank you

entry.title: Restriction on number of consolidation units in SAP Group Reporting Public Cloud edition.
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

Does SAP deliver group reporting solution along with Public cloud license without any additional cost? If yes, how many consolidation Units can be created with it?

Further, is there any difference with regards to the number of consolidation units from licensing perspective if we create a consolidation unit as a partner only?

entry.title: SAP CLOUD - EDOC_IT_XML_FILE - update description in changing structure
entry.content:
Dears Gurus,

I we wnat to use the standard badi EDOC_IT_XML_FILE to updated the text in the output xml. The text is correctly contained in the HEADER_ITEM_TEXTS table, we applied the following code based on sample provided but nothijng happen in changing structure:

READ TABLE xml_file_modified_121-fattura_elettronica_body
INDEX 1 ASSIGNING <ls_body2>.
IF <ls_body2>-dati_beni_servizi-dettaglio_linee IS NOT INITIAL.
READ TABLE header_item_texts
ASSIGNING <ls_headit_txt>
WITH KEY tdobject = lv_tdobj_item
tdid = '0001'
numero_linea = <ls_item_num>-numero_linea
tdspras = lv_tdspras.
APPEND INITIAL LINE TO <ls_body2>-dati_beni_servizi-dettaglio_linee ASSIGNING <ls_dettaglio2>.
<ls_dettaglio2>-descrizione = <ls_headit_txt>-tdline.
<ls_dettaglio2>-numero_linea = <ls_item_num>-numero_linea.
ELSE.
LOOP AT <ls_body2>-dati_beni_servizi-dettaglio_linee ASSIGNING <ls_dettaglio2>.
<ls_dettaglio2>-descrizione = <ls_headit_txt>-tdline.
<ls_dettaglio2>-numero_linea = <ls_item_num>-numero_linea.
ENDLOOP.
ENDIF.
ENDIF.

cdo you have any suggestions on it? even other sample code seems not working..

SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud

entry.title: Quarterly vat declaration Italy
entry.content:
Dear All,

our customer has three companies. One company with monthly VAT declaration and two companies with quarterly VAT declaration. For the first company there are no problems, for the other two companies there is a problem because for these the model that should come out from "Run Statutory Reports" APP should report the total for a single quarter and not the individual three months:

Is there another application to use for these situations?

Thanks and Kind Regards,

Gloria

entry.title: Freight document types
entry.content:
Hello,

In the version 2402, I don’t see any config to create new document types (for freight unit, freight order etc). There are few standard types given by SAP. However maintenance of those types are also not visible. Is this config completely off from public cloud ?

entry.title: CDS view Required - S4Hana Public Cloud MD04 - stock functionality (released)
entry.content:
Hi all,

we would like to use the stock calculation of the MD04 in a separate application (side-by-side). We try to find some CDS views which are actually released and cover the functionality. We can find the actual stock variants (i_materialstock..., I_EWM_AVAILABLESTOCK etc) but we also need to take reservations into account. 

Any option or combination available (released!) which we can use to cover the md04 functionality in a CDS view (API would be ok as well). 

Kind regards

Laurens

entry.title: Stock Ageing Report just gone live of SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition
entry.content:
Hi,

There's a question raised regarding stock ageing report when a client site has just gone live with S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition.

Can anyone share their experience if stock ageing report can be done when the client is quite new or has just gone live?

Obvious answer (if i'm not mistaken) is NO, standard reporting for stock ageing might not be of use in the beginning, for obvious reason of not having historical dates when posting "just the opening stock balance" when going live. 

But I'm more particularly interested in possible customized reporting, or perhaps possible use of SAP Analytics Cloud if needed.  Or perhaps is there a special way (or work around) of posting opening stock balance in S/4HANA Cloud for go live purposes, in such a way that you can bring-in some sort of historical dates as well... and in that way stock ageing report can be useful even if the client has just gone live with the system?

Your inputs will be greatly appreciated.

Thanks

Cath

entry.title: Demand Planning using historical sales data when just gone live with S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition
entry.content:
Hi,

Can i kindly get some inputs (sharing of ideas/experience, materials, blogs, links etc.) regarding addressing a requirement of being able to use S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition demand planning (or preparing sales forecast), when the client site has just gone live with the system?

These historical sales data is currently in excel, and the solution package include SAC planning (SAP Analytics Cloud), but they don't have SAP IPB.  The question is how can the client do a quite seamless demand planning or sales forecast preparation incorporating these sales history in excel, and potentially feed a final demand plan into S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition?  Can SAC planning be used with excel perhaps saved in a shared folder (SharePoint or company shared drive) as a data source?

Your inputs will be greatly appreciated.

Regards,

Cathy

entry.title: Is there an API for cost accounting results in S/4 Hana cloud
entry.content:
Dear Expert:

 1、Enter the "Manage Sales Quotations" app and find the quotation form

 

2、Select the quotation line items that require cost accounting and select Attachment - Cost Accounting

 

 

3、Performing cost accounting resulted in the following results.

I would like to know if there is an API available here for third-party queries.

If you could assist me with any questions, I would greatly appreciate it. 

 

Song

entry.title: how to check business catalog to be assigned For custom in app application in sap s4hana cloud?
entry.content:
Hello SAP,

We have developed a custom in-app application based on custom CDS views and analytical querying using standard views (I_MfgOrderDocdGoodsMovement and I_FixedAsset). We need to assign it to a particular user. How can we determine the suitable Business Catalog to assign to the custom application for the specific user to access it?

Could you please explain and assist us with our query?

Thanks and Regards, Ruchi Kesharwani

entry.title: Which is the correct Learning Journey and Certification for Project Managers for SAP S/4HANA, Public
entry.content:
In the below link, if you navigate to Knowledge Requirements > SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition > Role: Project Manager, the Learning Journey and Certification both point to the Implementation Consultant. Is this an error? If yes, can it be fixed so that we know which certification to do for this role?

https://partneredge.sap.com/en/partnership/manage/competency/requirements.html?#section-1-accordion-panel-section-row-item_2-widewidgets-accordionitem_copy_1_1292473518

Furthermore, the "Project Management" link in this page, is broken and does not take you anywhere:

https://partneredge.sap.com/en/products/s4hanacld/public-edition/about/training-and-education.html 

Thank you

entry.title: Add Header Text in Basic Date of Supplier Invoice
entry.content:
Hello,

we are using SAP S4HANA Cloud and we would like to add the header text in the area "Basic Data" when creating a supplier invoice in the app "Create Supplier Invoice". However when I try to Adapt UI it is not possible to move this field from the Details to Basic Data.

The background to this question is that users often forget to fill in the headertext because they have to click on “show more”.

Does anyone know a solution to this problem?

Thanks and BR
Mona
